complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.本章介绍如何通过”封装 (Package) + 料号 (PN)” 建立结构化的元: This chapter shows how to build structured component grouping and reuse through **Package + Part Number (PN)**: when multiple components share the same package — or share both package and part number — they can be auto-bucketed into one group, and their inspection parameters, training samples, and evaluation results aggregate at the group level.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.**封装 (Package)** ：几何/焊盘布局形态。是分组的第一层级（顶层）: **Package**: the geometric / pad-layout form factor. The top-level grouping key.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.**料号 (PN)** ：同一封装下的具体物料型号（可包含品牌/规格差异）。: **Part Number (PN)**: a specific part variant within a package (covering vendor or spec differences).
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.**分组 (Grouping)** ：系统按照”封装 → 料号 → 单个元件”建: **Grouping**: the system organizes components into the hierarchy **Package → Part Number → Component**, with views that can be switched among Part Number, Package, and individual Component.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.**共享参数** ：同组的检测参数（如检测阈值）可一次设置，所有成员继承。: **Shared parameters**: inspection parameters (thresholds, ratio bands, etc.) can be set once at the group level; every member inherits them.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.CAD 表格中含有丝印/标识、封装、料号、坐标、角度等字段。: the CAD spreadsheet carries fields for silkscreen / designator, package, part number, coordinates, and rotation angle.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.在自动编程向导中导入后：创建封装条目 → 关联料号 → 建立封装/料号层级 →: after importing in the Auto-Programming wizard, the system creates package entries, links them to part numbers, builds the package/PN hierarchy, and attaches components.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.缺失字段（如料号）时会按封装先分组，可后续手动补录。: When a field is missing (e.g. part number), components are first grouped by package; fill the rest in manually later.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.在模板编辑器中，从元件列表视图下，选中一个元件，在右侧设置栏打开模板。: In the Template Editor, switch to the Component list view, select a component, and open its template in the right-hand panel.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.按需编辑其封装、料号字段。点击保存即可。: Edit the package and part-number fields as needed, then click Save.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.可选：将该标准化元件 **保存到私有库**，便于下次复用。或者可以从私有库的元件: Optional: **Save to Private Library** so the standardized component can be reused later, or replace the current product's component from a private-library entry (see *Add from Library* below).
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.每个元件具有 **连接封装** 与 **连接料号** 两个开关（默认开启）。: Every component carries two switches — **Link Package** and **Link Part No.** — both on by default.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.**连接封装**：决定该元件是否加入其封装分组的统计与参数继承。: **Link Package**: whether the component joins its package group's statistics and parameter inheritance.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.**连接料号**：决定该元件是否参与对应料号的二级分组汇总。: **Link Part No.**: whether the component joins the second-tier roll-up for its part number.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.临时单独调参：可暂时关闭某个异常样本的继承，单独修改；确认后再重新加入。: Temporary one-off tuning — turn off inheritance for an unusual sample, adjust it on its own, verify, then re-link.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.关闭链接分组：当发现某个元件与当前分组内的元件区别较大时，如颜色不同、几何不同时: Drop a member out of the group — if a component differs substantially from the rest of the group (different color, different geometry), unlink it.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.左侧元件列表支持三种视图，通过顶部选项卡切换：: The component list on the left supports three views, switched from the tab strip at the top:
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.**元件**：平铺所有单体，适合逐件核对。展开某行后，可查看该元件的各检测类型。: **Component**: flat list of every component — best for one-by-one review. Expand a row to see the component's inspection types.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.**料号**：列表显示所有料号，将共享同一料号且已连接的元件折叠为一组；展开后可: **Part Number**: lists all part numbers; components sharing the same PN that are linked collapse into one group. Expand a group to manage its inspection types. Components with no PN appear under *Unknown Part Number*.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.**封装**：列表显示所有封装，将共享同一封装且已连接的元件折叠为一组；展开后可: **Package**: lists all packages; components sharing the same package that are linked collapse into one group. Expand a group to manage its inspection types. Components with no package appear under *Unknown Package*.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.在封装/料号视图下：: In the Package and Part Number views:
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.选中某封装或料号 → 右侧可汇总显示该组全部成员的统计（训练集数据的数量、评估结: Select a package or part number and the right panel shows aggregated statistics for every member — training-set counts, evaluation results, and charts.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.训练/评估后，可切换”封装”视图查看整体质量；定位某封装异常集中度。: After training/evaluation, switch to the **Package** view to see the overall quality and pinpoint packages with concentrated NGs.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.进入数据集浏览时，可过滤”当前封装”快速聚焦样本一致性（如焊料外形、引脚偏移模式: When browsing the dataset, filter by *current package* to quickly assess sample consistency (solder shape, lead-offset pattern, and so on).
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.点击元件列表上方的 **从库中添加** 按钮，打开 **查找模板** 对话框。: Click **Add from Library** above the component list to open the **Find Template** dialog.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.查找模板对话框：元件库（公共 / 私有）面板、模板列表与右侧元件信息预览: Find Template dialog: library navigator (Public / Private), template list, and the component-info preview on the right.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.对话框左侧为 **元件库** 导航栏，包含两个折叠分区：: The left side of the dialog hosts the **Library** navigator with two collapsible sections:
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.**公共**：系统内置的封装模板，按类别浏览或搜索。: **Public**: built-in package templates, browsable or searchable by category.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.**私有**：用户自行保存的模板，按封装编号列出。可通过 **私有库导出** 和: **Private**: templates the user has saved, listed by package number. Use **Export Private Library** and **Import Private Library** to back up or migrate it.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.中间区域为模板搜索结果列表，列出匹配的模板条目，显示以下列：: The middle column lists matching templates with the following columns:
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.操作列：私有库模板可 **删除**；公共模板不可删除。: Actions column: private templates can be **Deleted**; public templates cannot.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.点击列表中某行可在右侧预览区查看 **元件信息**，包括封装、料号、描述、元件宽: Click a row to see the **Component Info** preview on the right — package, part number, description, width (mm), and length (mm) — alongside a graphical preview of the template.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.确认后点击 **使用此模板**，将模板应用到当前选中位置的元件。: Click **Use this template** to apply the template to the currently-selected component position.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.在模板编辑器中完成元件的封装、料号配置后，可将其保存至私有库以供后续产品复用：: Once a component's package and part-number configuration is complete in the Template Editor, you can save it to the private library for future product reuse:
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.在右侧元件属性面板中，找到 **保存到私有库** 按钮并点击，系统将当前元件的封: In the component-properties panel on the right, find **Save to Private Library** and click it. The current component's package definition — including inspection regions and parameters — is saved as a private template that can later be retrieved through **Add from Library**.

complete_user_guide/features/variations..替代料（替代元件）是指同一元件位置上，被系统认可的多种合法外观形态。当检测流程将: An **Alternative Component** (variation) is one of several acceptable physical appearances at the same component position. When the inspection misclassifies an appearance-OK component as NG, the operator can mark it as a variation on the review page so that the system accepts the same appearance on subsequent inspections. Typical scenario: the same designator now carries parts from a different package or a different vendor, but the existing training images don't yet cover the new appearance.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..替代料与主元件共享同一元件位置（designator），在模板编辑器中以独立行显: Alternative components share the same designator as their primary component; they appear as separate rows in the Template Editor so their features can be inspected on their own. After creating a variation you must retrain the model before it takes effect in subsequent inspections.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..复检页面左侧 NG 列表区域，列出已检测的元件: The NG list on the left of the Review page shows the inspected components.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..替代料功能有两个入口：: Alternative components are reached from two places:
complete_user_guide/features/variations..在离线复检页面（``/inspection/review``）中，当某元件被判定: On the offline Review page (``/inspection/review``), when a component is flagged NG:
complete_user_guide/features/variations..在右侧 NG 元件列表中选中该元件。: Select the component in the NG list on the right.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..点击元件标题行右上角的 **...** 按钮，展开下拉菜单。: Click the **...** button at the top right of the component header to open its drop-down menu.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..点击 **设置为替代料**，打开替代料选择器对话框。: Click **Set as Alternative** to open the Alternative chooser dialog.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..复检页面元件标题行展开「...」下拉菜单，显示「设置为替代料」选项: Review page: the component header's *...* menu showing **Set as Alternative**.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..进入产品编程页面 → **元件** 标签页，即可在元件列表中查看已存在的替代料。: On the Teach page → **Component** tab, existing alternative components appear in the component list. Selecting a variation row exposes a **Variation** collapsible panel on the right with its part number and package, plus rename and bulk-copy controls.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..模板编辑器元件列表与右侧替代料面板: Template Editor — component list and the Variation panel on the right.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..**第一步：在复检页面触发替代料创建**: **Step 1: Trigger Alternative creation from the Review page**
complete_user_guide/features/variations..在复检页面选中误判为 NG 的元件后，点击 **...** → **设置为替代料: On the Review page, select the falsely-flagged NG component, then click **...** → **Set as Alternative** to open the **Add as Alternative** dialog (``review.setAsAlternativeChoiceTitle``).
complete_user_guide/features/variations..对话框说明：请选择操作方式：在视野图像上重新定义元件 ROI，或使用当前元件图像: Dialog copy: *Choose how to proceed: redraw the component ROI on the FOV image, or use the current component image as the variation's reference.*
complete_user_guide/features/variations..替代料选择器：「沿用当前元件图像」与「在视野图上绘制 ROI」两个操作选项: Alternative chooser with two options: **Keep current component image** and **Define new ROI on FOV**.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..**沿用当前元件图像** ：直接使用当前检测抓取的元件图像作为替代料的参考图像，: **Keep current component image**: reuse the component image captured during this inspection as the variation's reference image, then choose a fan-out scope on the next step. Use this when the image quality is good and the sampling area needs no adjustment.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..**在视野图上绘制 ROI** ：重新在视野图上框选元件范围，用于调整采样区域以: **Define new ROI on FOV**: re-box the component area on the FOV image to adjust the sampling region for a higher-quality reference image. This path does **not** create the variation immediately — it first updates the golden component shape, after which you re-inspect the board.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..如果该元件已在本轮复检中完成过\"绘制 ROI\"操作（系统会高亮显示相应行），: If you have already used **Define new ROI on FOV** for this component during the current review (the row is highlighted), that button is disabled with the hint *You have already redefined the ROI for this component — choose "Keep current component image" to create the variation against the freshly-inspected image.* Use **Keep current component image** in that case.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..**第三步A：沿用当前元件图像 — 选择批量同步范围**: **Step 3A: Keep current component image — pick the fan-out scope**
complete_user_guide/features/variations..选择 **沿用当前元件图像** 后，对话框进入第二步，显示批量同步（fan-ou: Selecting **Keep current component image** advances the dialog to its second step, which surfaces the fan-out (bulk-sync) options. Choose one:
complete_user_guide/features/variations..**不批量生成（仅当前元件）** ：仅为当前元件创建替代料，不影响其他元件。: **No fan-out (seed only)**: create the variation for this component only; nothing else changes.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..**按Part No同步** ：同时为所有与当前元件共享相同料号的其他元件批量生: **Sync by Part No.**: create the same variation on every other component sharing this part number. Disabled when this component has no part number.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..**按Package No同步** ：同时为所有与当前元件共享相同封装号的其他元: **Sync by Package No.**: create the same variation on every other component sharing this package number. Disabled when this component has no package number.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..选择范围后，点击 **沿用当前元件图像** 按钮提交。替代料创建成功后，系统会弹: After choosing the scope, click **Keep current component image** to submit. When the variation is created, a toast reminds you that retraining is required in the Template Editor.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..替代料选择器第二步：批量同步单选按钮组（不批量生成 / 按 Part No 同步: Alternative chooser step 2: the fan-out radio group — No fan-out / Sync by Part No. / Sync by Package No.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..**第三步B：在视野图上绘制 ROI — 更新基准元件形状**: **Step 3B: Define new ROI on FOV — update the golden component shape**
complete_user_guide/features/variations..选择 **在视野图上绘制 ROI** 后，打开 **添加为替代料** 对话框，显: Selecting **Define new ROI on FOV** opens the **Add as Alternative** dialog, which displays the NG component's FOV image.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..视野图中已默认预选当前元件的矩形框（红色虚线）。拖动角点或边缘手柄，从中心向外放: The component's existing rectangle is pre-selected on the FOV (red dashed outline). Drag the corner or edge handles outward from the center so the rectangle fully covers the target component — the rectangle can only grow; it can't shrink below the original size.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..如无需调整大小，可直接确认以沿用原始形状。: If no resize is needed, confirm directly to keep the original shape.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..绘制 ROI 对话框：视野图像、可调整的元件矩形框及红色虚线基准轮廓: Draw-ROI dialog: FOV image, adjustable component rectangle, and red dashed golden outline.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..提交后，系统更新基准元件形状，并自动重载当前检测会话的产品定义。此时页面提示：基: Once submitted, the system updates the golden component shape and reloads the running session's product definition. The page reads *Golden component shape updated — re-inspect this board, then use "Keep current component image" to create the variation.*
complete_user_guide/features/variations..重新触发该板的检测。: Re-trigger inspection on the same board.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..复检时再次选中该元件，点击 **...** → **设置为替代料**，进入选择器: On the new review, select the same component again, click **...** → **Set as Alternative**, and open the chooser.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..此时该元件行左侧会显示黄色标记，提示已在此前重新定义过 ROI。选择 **沿用当: The row now carries a yellow marker indicating the ROI was redefined earlier. Choose **Keep current component image** and finish creating the variation via the Step 3A flow.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..**第四步：在模板编辑器中管理替代料**: **Step 4: Manage variations in the Template Editor**
complete_user_guide/features/variations..替代料创建成功后，可在模板编辑器的元件列表中查看和管理：: After a variation is created, view and manage it from the Template Editor's component list:
complete_user_guide/features/variations..选中某替代料行后，右侧展示 **替代料** 折叠面板，包含以下功能：: Selecting a variation row exposes the **Variation** collapsible panel on the right, with these controls:
complete_user_guide/features/variations..**料号（Part No.）输入框 + 保存按钮** ：修改该替代料组的料号，点: **Part No. input + Save**: change the variation group's part number. Saving updates every related component sharing that PN.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..**封装号（Package No.）输入框 + 保存按钮** ：修改该替代料组的: **Package No. input + Save**: change the variation group's package number. Saving updates every related component sharing that package.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..**复制到相同料号** ：将当前替代料批量复制到所有共享相同料号的元件。料号为空: **Copy to same Part No.**: bulk-copy this variation to every component sharing the same PN. Disabled when the PN is empty.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..**复制到相同封装** ：将当前替代料批量复制到所有共享相同封装号的元件。封装号: **Copy to same Package No.**: bulk-copy this variation to every component sharing the same package. Disabled when the package is empty.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..替代料创建后，需在模板编辑器中触发重新训练，新建的替代料才能在后续检测任务中生效: After a variation is created you must trigger retraining in the Template Editor before it takes effect. When the variation is created the system surfaces the warning *Alternative created. This variation will not take effect in the current inspection task — go to the Template Editor to edit features and trigger retraining.*
complete_user_guide/features/variations..同时，若当前有正在运行的检测任务，系统会弹出对话框，询问是否停止当前任务。建议在: If an inspection session is running, the system also opens a dialog asking whether to stop it. Stopping the running session before retraining is recommended, so the newly-trained model is picked up cleanly on the next start.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..**替代料创建后不会自动触发重新训练。** 必须前往模板编辑页手动触发重新训练，: **Creating a variation does not auto-trigger retraining.** You must trigger retraining manually from the Template Editor before the variation affects future inspections. A running session must be stopped and restarted to pick up the new model.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..**\"在视野图上绘制 ROI\"路径需两步完成：** 绘制并提交时仅更新基准元: **The "Define new ROI on FOV" path takes two steps:** drawing and submitting only updates the golden component shape — it does not create the variation immediately. After re-inspecting the board, finish the variation creation via **Keep current component image**.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..**批量同步（fan-out）只能选择一种范围（料号或封装号，二选一或不选）。*: **Fan-out scope is single-select** — by part number, by package number, or none. If the matching field is empty on the component, the corresponding sync option is disabled.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..**替代料在模板编辑器中以独立行显示**，与原始主元件分开，不影响主元件的特征配: **A variation shows as a separate row in the Template Editor**, distinct from the primary, and does not affect the primary's feature configuration.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..**本页面仅描述离线复检流程。** 联机多后端（ReviewOnline）场景及: **This page covers the offline review flow only.** Online multi-backend review and MES integration are out of scope.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..**拼板场景下的替代料默认作用于所有子板。** 添加一次替代料后，所有子板上同一: **In PCB Array (panel) products, an alternative applies to every sub-board by default.** Adding it once covers all sub-boards at the same position; **do not** add it again on a different sub-board at the same position. Each duplicate variation is its own inference reference, so duplicates noticeably slow down each inspection and drag the line throughput.
